name: Integration - File Upload to Summary Email Formatting
description: Verifies that uploading a .pdf file triggers extraction, summarization, and formatting pipeline.
input: POST /summarize_file with a valid .pdf UploadFile, summary_length, and user_email.
output: FileUploadResponse with summary and structured_summary fields.
error_scenarios: FileExtractionError if PDF is empty or corrupt
InputValidationError if extracted text is too short
